title: Finite Proximal Gradient Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite proximal-gradient bad proximal point QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact L1 proximal replay computes prox_x=1 for trial point 3/2 and threshold 1/2, so the malformed point 1/4 has nonzero optimality residual.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional proximal rows only when they add distinct box-plus-L1, group-lasso, active-set, stochastic, or convergence pressure; keep general proximal-gradient convergence and rate theorems in horizon lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite proximal-gradient witnesses as deterministic exact-rational replay rows.
Replay derivatives, trial points, L1 soft-threshold values, optimality residuals, and composite objective values over exact rationals.
Route false proximal-optimality claims through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after replay computes the proximal residual.
Keep general proximal-gradient convergence, nonsmooth convex analysis, stochastic variants, and floating-point stability claims marked Lean-horizon until proof artifacts exist.
